      self.failures = 0\n213\t        self.last_failure_time = None\n214\t        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n215\t    \n216\t    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n217\t        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n218\t            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n219\t                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n220\t            else:\n221\t                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker is OPEN\")\n222\t        \n223\t        try:\n224\t            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n225\t            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n226\t                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n227\t                self.failures = 0\n228\t            return result\n229\t        except ZeroDivisionError:\n230\t            self.failures += 1\n231\t            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n232\t            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n233\t                self.state = 'OPEN'\n234\t None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n    \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker is OPEN\")\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n---\n\n## Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n371\t\n372\t**Priority:** CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n373\t**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, restores system stability\n374\t\n375\t**Recommended Code Solution:**\n376\t```python\n377\tdef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n378\t    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n379\t    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n380\t        # Extract parameters\n381\t        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n382\t        F = row['F']  # Forward price\n383\t        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n384\t        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n385\t        \n386\t        # Pre-calculation validation\n387\t        if t <= 0:\n388\t            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping calculation\")\n389\t            continue\n390\t        if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n391\t            logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters F={F}, K={K} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n392\t            continue\n393\t        if price <= 0:\n394\t            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n395\t            continue\n396\t            \n397\t        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n398\t        try:\n399\t            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n400\t                price, F, K, t, flag\n401\t            )\n402\t        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, Exception) as e:\n403\t            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {row.get('symbol')}: {e}\")\n404\t            continue\n405\t        \n406\t        chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n407\t    return chunk\n408\t```\n409\t\n410\t**Implementation Steps:**\n411\t1. Update calculation code with validation layer\n412\t2. Add comprehensive error handling and logging\n413\t3. Implement graceful error recovery\n414\t4. Add monitoring for validation failures\n415\t5. Deploy to canary environment for validation\n416\t6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\n417\t\n418\t#### 2. Monitor Implementation Effectiveness\n419\t\n420\t**Validation Commands:**\n421\t```bash\n422\t# Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\n423\tkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n424\t  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f -c worker | grep -i \"zerodivision\"\n425\t\n426\t# Track pod restart reduction\n427\twatch -n 60 'kubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 get pods -n options'\n428\t```\n429\t\n430\t**Success Criteria:**\n431\t- ZeroDivisionError events: 0 for 7+ consecutive days\n432\t- Pod restart count: Stabilized (no increases)\n433\t- Validation warnings: Properly logged for invalid data rejection\n434\t- System stability: No cascading failures\n435\t\n436\t### Medium-Term Actions 🟡\n437\t\n438\t#### 3. Implement Comprehensive Data Validation Layer\n439\t\n440\t**Priority:** HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations\n441\t\n442\t**Architecture Recommendation:**\n443\t```python\n444\tclass OptionsDataValidator:\n445\t    \"\"\"Comprehensive options data validation layer\"\"\"\n446\t    \n447\t    def __init__(self):\n448\t        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n449\t        self.validation_metrics = {}\n450\t    \n451\t    def validate_row(self, row):\n452\t        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n453\t        validation_checks = [\n454\t            (row['T'] > 0, f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\", \"t_zero\"),\n455\t            (row['F'] > 0, f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\", \"f_invalid\"),\n456\t            (row['K'] > 0, f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\", \"k_invalid\"),\n457\t            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\", \"price_invalid\")\n458\t        ]\n459\t        \n460\t        for valid, error_msg, metric_key in validation_checks:\n461\t            if not valid:\n462\t                self.logger.warning(f\"Validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n463\t                self.validation_metrics[metric_key] = self.validation_metrics.get(metric_key, 0) + 1\n464\t                return False\n465\t        return True\n466\t    \n467\t    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n468\t        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from processing chunk\"\"\"\n469\t        valid_rows = []\n470\t        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n471\t            if self.validate_row(row):\n472\t                valid_rows.append(row)\n473\t        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n474\t```\n475\t\n476\t#### 4. Add Observability and Telemetry\n477\t\n478\t**Metrics Collection:**\n479\t```python\n480\tfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n481\t\n482\toptions_metrics = {\n483\t    'validation_failures_total': Counter(\n484\t        'options_validation_failures_total',\n485\t        'Total validation failures',\n486\t        ['reason']\n487\t    ),\n488\t    'calculation_success_total': Counter(\n489\t        'options_calculation_success_total',\n490\t        'Successful calculations'\n491\t    ),\n492\t    'calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n493\t        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n494\t        'Calculation duration distribution'\n495\t    )\n496\t}\n497\t```\n498\t\n499\t**Monitoring Dashboard:** Grafana panels for:\n500\t- Validation failure rate by reason\n501\t- Calculation success rate trends\n502\t- Processing latency distribution\n503\t- Pod restart correlation analysis\n504\t\n505\t### Long-Term Improvements 🟢\n506\t\n507\t#### 5. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n508\t\n509\t**Architecture:**\n510\t```python\n511\tclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n512\t    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures with circuit breaker pattern\"\"\"\n513\t    \n514\t    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n515\t        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n516\t        self.timeout = timeout\n517\t        self.failures = 0\n518\t        self.last_failure_time = None\n519\t        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n520\t    \n521\t    def execute_with_protection(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n522\t        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n523\t        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n524\t            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n525\t                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n526\t            else:\n527\t                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker OPEN - too many failures\")\n528\t        \n529\t        try:\n530\t            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n531\t            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n532\t                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n533\t                self.failures = 0\n534\t            return result\n535\t        except ZeroDivisionError:\n536\t            self.failures += 1\n537\t            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n538\t            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n539\t                self.state = 'OPEN'\n540\t            raise\n541\t```\n542\t\n543\t#### 6. technical stacks\n\n**Key Finding:** The systems demonstrate complete independence in both error patterns and root causes.\n\n---\n\n## Recommendations\n\n### Immediate Actions Required 🔴\n\n#### 1. Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n\n**Priority:** CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, restores system stability\n\n**Recommended Code Solution:**\n```python\ndef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n        # Extract parameters\n        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n        F = row['F']  # Forward price\n        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n        \n        # Pre-calculation validation\n        if t <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping calculation\")\n            continue\n        if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters F={F}, K={K} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if price <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n            continue\n            \n        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n        try:\n            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n                price, F, K, t, flag\n            )\n        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, Exception) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {row.get('symbol')}: {e}\")\n            continue\n        \n        chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n    return chunk\n```\n\n**Implementation Steps:**\n1. Update calculation code with validation layer\n2. Add comprehensive error handling and logging\n3. Implement graceful error recovery\n4. Add monitoring for validation failures\n5. Deploy to canary environment for validation\n6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\n\n#### 2. Monitor Implementation Effectiveness\n\n**Validation Commands:**\n```bash\n# Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f -c worker | grep -i \"zerodivision\"\n\n# Track pod restart reduction\nwatch -n 60 'kubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 get pods -n options'\n```\n\n**Success Criteria:**\n- ZeroDivisionError events: 0 for 7+ consecutive days\n- Pod restart count: Stabilized (no increases)\n- Validation warnings: Properly logged for invalid data rejection\n- System stability: No cascading failures\n\n### Medium-Term Actions 🟡\n\n#### 3. Implement Comprehensive Data Validation Layer\n\n**Priority:** HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations\n\n**Architecture Recommendation:**\n```python\nclass OptionsDataValidator:\n    \"\"\"Comprehensive options data validation layer\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        self.validation_metrics = {}\n    \n    def validate_row(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n        validation_checks = [\n            (row['T'] > 0, f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\", \"t_zero\"),\n            (row['F'] > 0, f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\", \"f_invalid\"),\n            (row['K'] > 0, f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\", \"k_invalid\"),\n            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\", \"price_invalid\")\n        ]\n        \n        for valid, error_msg, metric_key in validation_checks:\n            if not valid:\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n                self.validation_metrics[metric_key] = self.validation_metrics.get(metric_key, 0) + 1\n                return False\n        return True\n    \n    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from processing chunk\"\"\"\n        valid_rows = []\n        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n            if self.validate_row(row):\n                valid_rows.append(row)\n        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n```\n\n#### 4. Add Observability and Telemetry\n\n**Metrics Collection:**\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n\noptions_metrics = {\n    'validation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_failures_total',\n        'Total validation failures',\n        ['reason']\n    ),\n    'calculation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_success_total',\n        'Successful calculations'\n    ),\n    'calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n        'Calculation duration distribution'\n    )\n}\n```\n\n**Monitoring Dashboard:** Grafana panels for:\n- Validation failure rate by reason\n- Calculation success rate trends\n- Processing latency distribution\n- Pod restart correlation analysis\n\n### Long-Term Improvements 🟢\n\n#### 5. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures with circuit breaker pattern\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout\n        self.failures = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n    \n    def execute_with_protection(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker OPEN - too many failures\")\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 6. Enhanced Infrastructure Monitoring\n\n**Structured Logging:**\n```python\nimport json\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nclass StructuredLogger:\n    def __init__(self, service_name):\n        self.service_name = service_name\n    \n    def log_event(self, level, event_type, **kwargs):\n        log_entry = {\n            'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),\n            'service': self.service_name,\n            'level': level,\n            'event_type': event_type,\n            **kwargs\n        }\n        print(json.dumps(log_entry))\n```\n\n**Distributed Tracing:** OpenTelemetry integration for end-to-end request tracking\n\n#### 7. \"/usr/local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/py_vollib_vectorized/implied_volatility.py\", line 77\n```\n\n**Technical Analysis:**\nThe calculation engine attempts to compute implied volatility using mathematically invalid input parameters, causing division by zero errors:\n- Time to expiration (T) ≤ 0\n- Forward price (F) ≤ 0 or Strike price (K) ≤ 0\n- Invalid option prices reaching calculation layer\n\n**Frequency Analysis:**\n- **30-Day Count:** 504+ confirmed error events across multiple pods\n- **Primary Pod (24p6f):** 165 ZeroDivisionError occurrences\n- **Secondary Pod (jlzqd):** 339 technical stacks\n\n**Key Finding:** The systems demonstrate complete independence in both error patterns and root causes.\n\n---\n\n## Recommendations\n\n### Immediate Actions Required 🔴\n\n#### 1. Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n\n**Priority:** CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, restores system stability\n\n**Recommended Code Solution:**\n```python\ndef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n        # Extract parameters\n        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n        F = row['F']  # Forward price\n        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n        \n        # Pre-calculation validation\n        if t <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping calculation\")\n            continue\n        if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters F={F}, K={K} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if price <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n            continue\n            \n        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n        try:\n            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n                price, F, K, t, flag\n            )\n        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, Exception) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {row.get('symbol')}: {e}\")\n            continue\n        \n        chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n    return chunk\n```\n\n**Implementation Steps:**\n1. Update calculation code with validation layer\n2. Add comprehensive error handling and logging\n3. Implement graceful error recovery\n4. Add monitoring for validation failures\n5. Deploy to canary environment for validation\n6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\n\n#### 2. Monitor Implementation Effectiveness\n\n**Validation Commands:**\n```bash\n# Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 logs -f -n options \\\n  options-greeks-7cbcd5dff4-24p6f -c worker | grep -i \"zerodivision\"\n\n# Track pod restart reduction\nwatch -n 60 'kubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 get pods -n options'\n```\n\n**Success Criteria:**\n- ZeroDivisionError events: 0 for 7+ consecutive days\n- Pod restart count: Stabilized (no increases)\n- Validation warnings: Properly logged for invalid data rejection\n- System stability: No cascading failures\n\n### Medium-Term Actions 🟡\n\n#### 3. Implement Comprehensive Data Validation Layer\n\n**Priority:** HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations\n\n**Architecture Recommendation:**\n```python\nclass OptionsDataValidator:\n    \"\"\"Comprehensive options data validation layer\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        self.validation_metrics = {}\n    \n    def validate_row(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n        validation_checks = [\n            (row['T'] > 0, f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\", \"t_zero\"),\n            (row['F'] > 0, f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\", \"f_invalid\"),\n            (row['K'] > 0, f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\", \"k_invalid\"),\n            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\", \"price_invalid\")\n        ]\n        \n        for valid, error_msg, metric_key in validation_checks:\n            if not valid:\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n                self.validation_metrics[metric_key] = self.validation_metrics.get(metric_key, 0) + 1\n                return False\n        return True\n    \n    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from processing chunk\"\"\"\n        valid_rows = []\n        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n            if self.validate_row(row):\n                valid_rows.append(row)\n        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n```\n\n#### 4. Add Observability and Telemetry\n\n**Metrics Collection:**\n```python\nfrom prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram\n\noptions_metrics = {\n    'validation_failures_total': Counter(\n        'options_validation_failures_total',\n        'Total validation failures',\n        ['reason']\n    ),\n    'calculation_success_total': Counter(\n        'options_calculation_success_total',\n        'Successful calculations'\n    ),\n    'calculation_duration_seconds': Histogram(\n        'options_calculation_duration_seconds',\n        'Calculation duration distribution'\n    )\n}\n```\n\n**Monitoring Dashboard:** Grafana panels for:\n- Validation failure rate by reason\n- Calculation success rate trends\n- Processing latency distribution\n- Pod restart correlation analysis\n\n### Long-Term Improvements 🟢\n\n#### 5. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures with circuit breaker pattern\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout\n        self.failures = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n    \n    def execute_with_protection(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker OPEN - too many failures\")\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 6. Enhanced Infrastructure Monitoring\n\n**Structured Logging:**\n```python\nimport json\nimport logging\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\nclass StructuredLogger:\n    def __init__(self, service_name):\n        self.service_name = service_name\n    \n    def log_event(self, level, event_type, **kwargs):\n        log_entry = {\n            'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),\n            'service': self.service_name,\n            'level': level,\n            'event_type': event_type,\n            **kwargs\n        }\n        print(json.dumps(log_entry))\n```\n\n**Distributed Tracing:** OpenTelemetry integration for end-to-end request tracking\n\n#### 7. technical stacks\n\n**Key Finding:** The systems demonstrate complete independence in both error patterns and root causes.\n\n---\n\n## Recommendations\n\n### Immediate Actions Required 🔴\n\n#### 1. Fix ZeroDivisionError in Options Pipeline\n\n**Priority:** CRITICAL - Active production issue  \n**Impact:** Eliminates primary failure mode, restores system stability\n\n**Recommended Code Solution:**\n```python\ndef calculate_iv_with_validation(chunk):\n    \"\"\"Calculate implied volatility with comprehensive input validation\"\"\"\n    for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n        # Extract parameters\n        t = row['T']  # Time to expiration\n        F = row['F']  # Forward price\n        K = row['K']  # Strike price\n        price = row['undiscounted_option_price']\n        \n        # Pre-calculation validation\n        if t <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid T={t} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping calculation\")\n            continue\n        if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters F={F}, K={K} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n            continue\n        if price <= 0:\n            logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price={price} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}, skipping\")\n            continue\n            \n        # Safe calculation with exception handling\n        try:\n            iv = py_vollib_vectorized.implied_volatility.vectorized_implied_volatility(\n                price, F, K, t, flag\n            )\n        except (ZeroDivisionError, ValueError, Exception) as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Calculation failed for symbol {row.get('symbol')}: {e}\")\n            continue\n        \n        chunk.at[idx, 'IV'] = iv\n    return chunk\n```\n\n**Implementation Steps:**\n1. Update calculation code with validation layer\n2. Add comprehensive error handling and logging\n3. Implement graceful error recovery\n4. Add monitoring for validation failures\n5. Deploy to canary environment for validation\n6. Monitor for ZeroDivisionError elimination\n\n#### 2. Implement Comprehensive Data Validation Layer\n\n**Priority:** HIGH - Prevents invalid data from reaching calculations\n\n**Architecture Recommendation:**\n```python\nclass OptionsDataValidator:\n    \"\"\"Comprehensive options data validation layer\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self):\n        self.logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\n        self.validation_metrics = {}\n    \n    def validate_row(self, row):\n        \"\"\"Validate a single options data row\"\"\"\n        validation_checks = [\n            (row['T'] > 0, f\"Invalid T={row['T']}\", \"t_zero\"),\n            (row['F'] > 0, f\"Invalid F={row['F']}\", \"f_invalid\"),\n            (row['K'] > 0, f\"Invalid K={row['K']}\", \"k_invalid\"),\n            (row['undiscounted_option_price'] > 0, f\"Invalid price={row['undiscounted_option_price']}\", \"price_invalid\")\n        ]\n        \n        for valid, error_msg, metric_key in validation_checks:\n            if not valid:\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Validation failed: {error_msg} for symbol {row.get('symbol')}\")\n                self.validation_metrics[metric_key] = self.validation_metrics.get(metric_key, 0) + 1\n                return False\n        return True\n    \n    def filter_chunk(self, chunk):\n        \"\"\"Filter out invalid rows from processing chunk\"\"\"\n        valid_rows = []\n        for idx, row in chunk.iterrows():\n            if self.validate_row(row):\n                valid_rows.append(row)\n        return pd.DataFrame(valid_rows)\n```\n\n#### 4. Implement Circuit Breaker Pattern\n\n**Architecture:**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculationCircuitBreaker:\n    \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures with circuit breaker pattern\"\"\"\n    \n    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=10, timeout=300):\n        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n        self.timeout = timeout\n        self.failures = 0\n        self.last_failure_time = None\n        self.state = 'CLOSED'\n    \n    def execute_with_protection(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError(\"Circuit breaker OPEN - too many failures\")\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failures = 0\n            return result\n        except ZeroDivisionError:\n            self.failures += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failures >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 6.
